body.body: Split igor/web/server.py into two parts: (1) standalone channel process (python -m igor.channel) — message persistence + broadcast, writes to Postgres, no Igor dependency. Endpoints: POST /channel (post message), GET /channel (read recent), GET /health. (2) Igor telemetry stays in igor.main. After extraction: Igor reconnects as a client. CC sessions post/read directly without Igor running. Channel stays up across Igor restarts. This is the coordination substrate for multi-session CC work. Prerequisite for sprint skill and shared multi-session coordination.
body.title: Extract web channel to standalone process
